== Notes for [[Item:Q115685|Q115685]] ==

Raised in the court of Alfonso VI married 1087 Urraca Froilaz daughter of Count Froila Arias de Traba and Ardiu Didaci. Grandson of Hermenegildo Gutierrez.
See also Alfonso Froilaz El Jorobado, Born 911 died 933 who was king of Leon and Galecia 925 through 926. Sone was Ordono IV. Was also family of Fruela II de Leon whose wife was Nunila Jimena, daughter of Sancho Garces I. Married Urraca of the Banu Qasi de Tudela.
Fuentes:
HISTORIA DEL MONASTERIO DE SOBRADO.P.Mauricio Carbajo. FERROL Y PUENTEDEUME. Cesar Vaamonde Lores. CASTILLOS MEDIEVALES DE LA PROVINCIA DE LA CORUÑA. D. Angel del Castillo. HISTORIA DE LA SANTA M.I.DE SANTIAGO. Antonio López Ferreiro. BLASONES Y LINAJES DE GALICIA P. Crespo Pozo DE GALICIA EN LA EDAD MÉDIA, SOCIEDAD ESPACIO Y PODER. Ermelindo Portela y Carmen Pallares. Research Copyright 2008, John J. Browne Ayes

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
